name: linkedin-chrome-copilot
description: Claude Code plugin for LinkedIn workflows on macOS Chrome. Per-locale profile-edit forms (PT/EN/ES), message-triage routing, send verification, calendar slot booking, document tailoring, locale-variant sync. Chrome automation delegated to claude-mac-chrome sibling plugin. No PII in committed artifacts — enforced by pii-scan CI gate.
requires_notes: Requires claude-mac-chrome >= 1.1.1 installed as a sibling plugin. macOS 13+ only. See README Platform Support section.
